info.name: Product Service
info.description:
# Product Service

Base URL: `{{product_service}}{{api_prefix}}`

Manages the product catalog (components, pricing, stock). Supports full CRUD for products and their attributes, including error/edge-case scenarios.

request.description: Retrieves all products in the system. No filters or pagination applied.
Retrieves a single product by its ID. Returns 404 if not found.

item.name: Get Product By Id Not Found

request.description:
Negative test -- tries to get a non-existent product.

**Expected:** 404 Not Found
Retrieves all products belonging to a specific category by category ID.
Retrieves all products of a specific brand (case-insensitive).
Retrieves products within a specific price range.

Creates a new product. Required fields: `name`, `price`, `categoryId`, `brand`, `model`.

**Expected:** 201 Created

Negative test -- sends null/empty required fields and invalid price.

**Expected:** 400 Bad Request (validation error)

Updates an existing product's details.

**Expected:** 200 OK

Negative test -- tries to update a non-existent product.

**Expected:** 404 Not Found

Deletes a product by ID.

**Expected:** 204 No Content

Negative test -- tries to delete a non-existent product.

**Expected:** 404 Not Found

Soft-deletes (deactivates) a product by ID.

**Expected:** 204 No Content

Negative test -- tries to deactivate a non-existent product.

**Expected:** 404 Not Found
Retrieves all attributes for a specific product.

Negative test -- tries to get attributes of a non-existent product.

**Expected:** 404 Not Found

Adds a new attribute to a product. Required fields: `attributeName`, `attributeValue`.

**Expected:** 201 Created

Negative test -- sends empty attribute name and value.

**Expected:** 400 Bad Request (validation error)

Updates an existing product attribute.

**Expected:** 200 OK

Negative test -- tries to update a non-existent attribute.

**Expected:** 404 Not Found

Deletes a product attribute by ID.

**Expected:** 204 No Content

Negative test -- tries to delete a non-existent attribute.

**Expected:** 404 Not Found
Through gateway: Retrieves all products in the system. No filters or pagination applied.
Through gateway: Retrieves a single product by its ID. Returns 404 if not found.
